info.name: TicketBox Backend
info.description: Postman collection for TicketBox backend endpoints. Includes real Orders + Payments flow using global interceptor response format. Set concertId + ticketTypeId from prisma seed output before running Orders + Payments.

item.name: Auth
item.description: AuthModule endpoints from src/routes/auth/auth.controller.ts. Refresh token is stored as an httpOnly cookie named refreshToken on /auth/refresh. Use Seed Admin Login after running npm run db:seed with SEED_ADMIN_* env vars when testing protected Concert routes.

item.name: Concerts
item.description: ConcertModule endpoints from src/routes/concert/concert.controller.ts. GET list/detail are public. Protected routes require Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} with RBAC permissions only. There is no data scope check in guards.

exec: throw new Error('Missing accessToken. Login with a user that has concert:create first.');

body.raw:
{
  "name": "{{concertName}}",
  "description": "A sample concert created from Postman.",
  "artistName": "The TicketBox Band",
  "venueName": "TicketBox Arena",
  "venueAddress": "123 Nguyen Hue, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City",
  "eventDate": "{{concertEventDate}}",
  "seatMapSvg": "<svg viewBox=\"0 0 100 100\"><rect width=\"100\" height=\"100\" /></svg>",
  "posterUrl": "https://example.com/posters/ticketbox-live.png"
}

request.description: Cancels draft or published concerts. Requires concert:cancel permission. Refund/payment and notification work belongs to other modules later.

exec: throw new Error('Missing draftConcertId. Use a published concert with eventDate in the past.');
throw new Error('Missing accessToken. Login with a user that has concert:update first.');

request.description: Marks a published concert as completed only after eventDate has passed. Requires concert:update permission. The create flow uses a future date, so use this manually with a suitable published concert.

item.name: Orders + Payments
item.description: Real order/payment flow. Requires a customer accessToken, concertId, and ticketTypeId from seeded or manually created data. Run Auth > Register/Login first, then set concertId and ticketTypeId collection variables from prisma seed output before POST /orders. The flow saves orderId, paymentRef, paymentAmount, and firstTicketId for later requests.

item.name: POST /orders - Create real order and hold tickets

item.name: Admin Concert Uploads
item.description: Admin/concert upload endpoints from GuestListModule and AiBioModule. Controllers currently do not enforce JWT, but run Seed Admin Login first if you want to follow the admin flow. In Postman, set guestListCsvFilePath and artistBioPdfFilePath to local files before running.
